untranslatable_reason: Pipe Bottom pattern requires detection of two closely-spaced spikes with specific volume characteristics (above average on left spike, below average on right spike) and distinction between inside vs outside weeks. These multi-bar structural features and the precise temporal/volume relationship between two distinct spikes cannot be accurately expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern requires sequential multi-candle analysis with volume contrast logic that exceeds the scope of available indicator library.
